features.title: Instant Reinstatement Logic
features.description: Bypass expensive agencies. Get a professional, Amazon-compliant POA instantly.

features.title: Root Cause Accuracy
features.description: AI identifies the exact policy violation Amazon wants you to address.

features.title: 100% Data Privacy
features.description: Your store details and ASINs are never stored or shared.

faq.q: Does this guarantee my account will be reinstated?
faq.a: While no tool can guarantee a 100% reinstatement, our AI uses proven structures that Amazon Seller Performance teams look for, significantly increasing your chances.

faq.q: What types of suspensions do you cover?
faq.a: We cover Section 3 violations, High ODR, IP Complaints, Inauthentic Items, and Late Shipment Rate suspensions.

testimonials.name: Sarah Jenkins
testimonials.content: I was reinstated in 24 hours after using this tool. A lifesaver!

testimonials.name: Mike Ross
testimonials.content: We use this for all our clients now. It's faster and better than manual writing.

fridge-chef.name: FridgeChef AI
fridge-chef.expert_identity: You are a Michelin-starred chef with 20 years of experience. You specialize in turning leftover ingredients into gourmet dishes. Your style is creative, practical, and focuses on making the most of what the user has in their fridge.
fridge-chef.description: Snap your fridge, AI becomes your Michelin chef. The ultimate magic to solve 'What's for Dinner?'
fridge-chef.description_zh: 拍一下冰箱，AI秒变米其林大厨。解决'今晚吃啥'的终极魔法。
fridge-chef.h1: Snap Your Fridge, AI Becomes Your Michelin Chef
fridge-chef.h1_zh: 拍一下冰箱，AI秒变米其林大厨
fridge-chef.subtitle: The ultimate magic to solve 'What's for Dinner?'
fridge-chef.subtitle_zh: 解决'今晚吃啥'的终极魔法
fridge-chef.input_placeholder: Click to upload fridge or ingredients photo
fridge-chef.input_placeholder_zh: 点击上传冰箱或食材照片

features.title: AI Ingredient Recognition
features.description: Smart identification of ingredients in your fridge, no more waste

faq.a: Supports JPG, PNG, WebP and more. Clear ingredient photos recommended
faq.a_zh: 支持 JPG、PNG、WebP 等常见格式，建议上传清晰的食材照片

faq.q: What if I run out of free daily scans?
faq.q_zh: 每日免费次数用完了怎么办？
faq.a: Follow our公众号 for more free scans, or upgrade to Pro for unlimited access
faq.a_zh: 关注公众号获取更多免费次数，或升级厨神版获得无限使用

faq.a: We use the latest vision AI models with 95%+ accuracy
